case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS MCCALOPE PAUL T.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCALOPE PAUL T.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $446.68 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT MCCALOPE PAUL T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MCCALOPE PAUL T.
